summary: Completed testing of backend refactoring (P1) and frontend dashboard redesign (P0). Backend: 20/20 tests passed - all API endpoints working correctly. Frontend: All features working - timer card, project chips (NOW VISIBLE AND CLICKABLE), stats grid, clock-in/break/clock-out flows all verified.

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic only
props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring from 2750-line server.py to modular architecture is clean and well-organized
All route modules properly imported and registered in server.py
Dashboard index.tsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Project chips issue from iteration_8 has been FIXED - chips now visible and clickable
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Multiple projects available in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Backend refactoring complete with modular architecture. Frontend dashboard redesign complete with mobile-first logirent style. Project chips issue from iteration_8 has been fixed - now visible and clickable. Clock-in/break/clock-out flows all working correctly.
